subcodes.first_line: The True One, exalted be His glory, testifieth unto His own oneness, and this Wronged One beareth witness unto that which from aforetime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله شهادت میدهد بوحدانیت خود و این مظلوم گواهی میدهد بانچه از قبل و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause
